channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: California still hasn't released Baby2Baby diaper contract as lawmakers weigh longer public records delays
item.description: The Newsom administration waited 24 days to decide if it would even let Californians see the multi-million-dollar contract with Baby2Baby, a nonprofit...

item.title: U.S. voices concern over China's nuclear expansion following missile test
item.description: China conducted a test launch of a long-range ballistic missile from a nuclear submarine in the South Pacific, prompting international criticism.

item.title: Prosecutors allege Telegram used to share rape videos and drugging advice
item.description: Court documents describe suspects posting attack videos and using coded language, referring to women as 'cars' and rape as 'driving.'

item.title: Trump declares Iran ceasefire over, calls negotiations 'waste of time'
item.description: Oil prices surged 5% after President Trump stated that negotiations with Iran were futile and had ended.
